name: Deadrise.io
author: Poki
description: DeadRise.io is an intense survival shooter that throws you straight into a full-blown zombie apocalypse! Fight endless waves of bloodthirsty undead using powerful weapons as hordes swarm you from every direction. The action gets tougher the longer you survive, pushing your reflexes and strategy to the limit. Perfect for fans of fast-paced zombie chaos, DeadRise.io is all about how long you can last. Lock and load, can you survive the rise of the dead? How to play DeadRise.io? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Shoot: left click Who created DeadRise.io? DeadRise.io is created by Gamebole Studios. Play their other games on Poki: CleanScape Masters , Pool Merge Io and Car Detailing Master ! How can I play DeadRise.io for free? You can play DeadRise.io for free on Poki. Can I play DeadRise.io on mobile devices and desktop? DeadRise.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
